meta.homeTitle: Playa Venao Adventures | Surf, Fish & Explore Panama
meta.homeDescription: Surf trips, surf camps, fishing adventures and jeep tours in Playa Venao, Panama. Local experts, small groups, golden-hour vibes.

surf.intro: World-class waves, warm water, and local guides who know every break at Playa Venao.

slides.title: Daily Surf Sessions
slides.text: Morning and afternoon sessions for all levels — boards and guidance included.

slides.title: Learn to Surf
slides.text: First time? Our patient instructors will have you standing on your first day.

slides.title: Advanced Coaching
slides.text: Refine your technique on Playa Venao's legendary point break with pro tips.

fishing.intro: Sunset boat trips, full gear, and the thrill of the catch off Panama's Pacific coast.

slides.title: Sunset Fishing Trips
slides.text: Head out at golden hour — rods, bait, and cold drinks ready on board.

slides.title: Deep Sea Adventures
slides.text: Target trophy fish in deep Pacific waters with experienced local captains.

slides.title: Coastal Catch
slides.text: Relaxed inshore trips perfect for families and first-time anglers.

jeep.intro: Explore hidden beaches, jungle trails, and coastal viewpoints off the beaten path.

slides.title: Coastal Off-Road
slides.text: Ride rugged trails along the coast to secret beaches and scenic overlooks.

slides.title: Jungle & Beach Combo
slides.text: From dusty backroads to pristine sand — a full day of exploration.

slides.title: Sunset Jeep Tour
slides.text: Chase the sunset along the coast with stops for photos and cold drinks.

horse.intro: Ride along the beach and through tropical trails with gentle, well-trained horses.

slides.title: Beach Horseback Riding
slides.text: Gallop or stroll along Playa Venao's sandy shores at your own pace.

slides.title: Trail Rides
slides.text: Wind through lush hills and coastal paths with an experienced guide.

slides.title: Sunset Rides
slides.text: The most magical hour — horseback on the beach as the sun dips below the horizon.

lodging.intro: Comfortable stays steps from the ocean — wake up and walk to the waves.

slides.title: Ocean-View Rooms
slides.text: Bright, airy rooms with tropical vibes and steps from the beach.

slides.title: Surf Camp Packages
slides.text: Stay + surf bundles — accommodation and daily sessions in one easy package.

slides.title: Group & Long Stays
slides.text: Discounts for groups and extended stays. Make Playa Venao your home base.

hero.title: Ride the Wave. Live the Adventure.
hero.subtitle: Surf trips, camps, fishing & jeep tours in tropical paradise

intro.title: Your gateway to Panama's hidden coast
intro.body: Playa Venao Adventures is a local crew offering unforgettable surf sessions, multi-day camps, sunset fishing, and off-road jeep explorations — all wrapped in good vibes and golden-hour energy.

surfTrips.title: Surf Trips
surfTrips.teaser: Daily sessions for every skill level on world-class breaks.

surfCamps.title: Surf Camps
surfCamps.teaser: Multi-day immersion — coaching, community, and ocean time.

fishing.title: Fishing Trips
fishing.teaser: Sunset boat trips with gear included and stories guaranteed.

jeep.title: Jeep Trips
jeep.teaser: Off-road coastal exploration beyond the beaten path.

local.title: Local experts
local.body: Born and raised on this coast — we know every break, trail, and sunset spot.

levels.title: All skill levels
levels.body: From first-time surfers to seasoned pros, every adventure is tailored to you.

groups.title: Small groups
groups.body: Personal experiences, not tourist-bus energy. Just you, the crew, and the ocean.

cta.title: Ready for your adventure?
cta.subtitle: Tell us what you're dreaming of — we'll make it happen.
